---
title: "About – #equilibria"
description: "About the #equilibria tutorial site, its author, and its goals."
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <div class="kicker">ABOUT</div>
  <h1>About #equilibria</h1>
  <p class="lead">A comprehensive, open-access tutorial site covering game theory, decision-making, simulation, AI/ML, and the data behind them — with runnable R examples and interactive Shiny apps throughout.</p>
</div>
```

## Author

**Raban Heller**
[ORCID: 0000-0001-8006-9742](https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8006-9742)
[GitHub: r-heller](https://github.com/r-heller)

## Scope

- Comprehensive coverage across 32 topic areas
- Interactive Shiny applications paired with selected tutorials
- **R primary**, Python via `reticulate` for advanced topics
- Every article includes publication-ready static figures and interactive visualizations

## Technology

- Built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org)
- Hosted on [GitHub Pages](https://pages.github.com/)
- Interactive apps powered by [Shiny](https://shiny.posit.co/)
- Figures use the Okabe-Ito colorblind-safe palette

## License

- **Code**: [MIT License](LICENSE)
- **Content**: [CC BY-SA 4.0](LICENSE-CONTENT)

## Contact

[58561665+r-heller@users.noreply.github.com](mailto:58561665+r-heller@users.noreply.github.com)
